name: l isoleucine
description: Isoleucine is a branched-chain essential amino acid added to food products to support protein synthesis and muscle recovery.
raw_text: Isoleucine (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Isoleucine goodie What-it-does: skin-identical ingredient Official CosIng Information All Functions: antistatic, hair conditioning, skin conditioning CAS #: 73-32-5 / 443-79-8 | EC #: 200-798-2 / 207-139-8 Chemical/IUPAC Name: L-Isoleucine; Dl-Allo-Isoleucine; 2-Amino-3-Methylpentanoic Acid Details A branch-chained, essential amino acid that can be found in things like almond, cashew or soy protein. When taken orally it may promote protein synthesis. As for skincare - like all the amino acids - it's a skin-identical ingredient and moisturizer . It also seems to be useful as a barrier repair ingredient . [more] [more] [less] Something incorrect or missing? Let us know!
